docs.title: StaffOps ChatOps
docs.text:
Self-hosted AI Agent Platform — orchestrating kiro and claude behind a unified API, with conversation distillation feeding a shared knowledge base, and direct integration with anomaly-detection alerts.

Documentation in progress

This MkDocs site was just bootstrapped (2026-05-31). Most pages are placeholders. Authoritative content still lives in the repo README.md and .kiro/specs/. Each placeholder page links back to its source.

docs.title: What this is
docs.text:
A FastAPI gateway (agent-api) that:

  • Exposes an OpenAI-compatible endpoint (/v1/chat/completions) for chat clients
  • Routes prompts to per-agent sidecar runners (kiro, claude) running in isolated containers
  • Manages persistent workspaces per session (with Redis-backed locks + filesystem storage)
  • Receives alerts from staffops-anomaly-detection via webhook → does preliminary RCA
  • Listens to Slack monitoring channels for pre-analysis
  • (Planned) Distills conversations into a shared knowledge base with RAG injection

docs.title: Quick links
docs.text:
• :material-rocket-launch: Getting Started Spin up the local stack with docker compose up

  • :material-sitemap: Architecture Sidecar pattern, components, data flow, design decisions

  • :material-api: API Reference Sessions, OpenAI-compatible bridge, webhooks, auth

  • :material-robot: Agents Kiro, Claude, platform directives (steering/skills)

  • :material-message-text: Channels Slack, LibreChat (legacy)

  • :material-database: Knowledge Base Conversation distillation, RAG injection

  • :material-tools: Operations Deployment, observability, runbooks

  • :material-code-tags: Development Building, testing, contributing, specs

docs.title: Project status
docs.text:
Area Status MVP API (sessions, runs, OpenAI-compat) ✅ functional Sidecar runners (kiro, claude, opencode) ✅ functional (opencode in deprecation) Slack channel ✅ v1 functional, mock-only tests LibreChat UI ⚠️ functional but legacy — Mongo crash-loop debugging in progress OTel SDK instrumentation ❌ collector deployed, code not instrumented yet (Iteração 2 planned) Conversation distillation 📋 spec written (.kiro/specs/conversation-distillation/) — not implemented Platform agent directives 📋 design pending Anomaly-detection integration 📋 design pending Multi-arch CI build 📋 workflow exists, not exercised

See TODO.md and CHANGELOG.md at the repo root for the full roadmap.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
staffops-chaitops/
├── agent-api/           # FastAPI gateway (Python 3.11, asyncio)
├── runners/             # Per-agent CLI sidecars
│   ├── kiro/            # Active
│   ├── claude/          # Active
│   ├── opencode/        # Deprecated
│   └── base/
├── channels/            # External integrations
│   ├── slack/           # Slack adapter (v1)
│   ├── teams/           # Placeholder
│   └── discord/         # Placeholder
├── config/
│   ├── agents/          # Agent manifests (YAML)
│   └── mcp.json.example
├── infra/
│   └── otel-collector/  # OTel collector config
├── scripts/             # Tooling (seed-dev, docs-serve, docs-build)
├── docs/                # ← this site
├── .kiro/specs/         # Feature specs (requirements/design/tasks)
└── docker-compose.yml   # 8-container local stack

docs.title: Sumário planejado
docs.text:
• Por que precisa: workspace nasce vazio (sem steering/skills)
  • Layered mounting (Layer 1-5):
  • Layer 1: platform commons
  • Layer 2: per-agent overlay
  • Layer 3: per-source overlay (alert, monitoring, chat)
  • Layer 4: repo-specific (.kiro/ clonado)
  • Layer 5: KB injection runtime
  • Como editar diretrizes (markdown + git)
  • Sync .kiro/ → .claude/ (reuso de sync-to-claude.sh)

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.text:
Placeholder

Esta página está aguardando conteúdo. Origem planejada: Sintomas comuns + checks read-only

docs.title: Sumário planejado
docs.text:
• Stack não sobe (verificar healthchecks dos containers)
  • Agent retorna 503 (sidecar não-healthy)
  • /ready retorna 503 (Redis unreachable)
  • Worker pool full (HTTP 429)
  • LibreChat não loga (Mongo crash-loop — ver runbook)
  • Streaming trava no client (X-Accel-Buffering header)

Última atualização: 2026-05-31 (página criada vazia no bootstrap do MkDocs)

docs.title: Distillation Stalled
docs.text:
Placeholder

Esta página está aguardando conteúdo. Origem planejada: .kiro/specs/conversation-distillation/ (alerta DistillationStalled)

docs.title: Sumário planejado
docs.text:
• Sintoma: nenhuma destilação em 1h apesar de conversas criadas
  • Diagnóstico: worker pod alive? OpenAI API responsivo? Postgres acessível?
  • Mitigação: replay manual da fila, rotação de chave OpenAI, restart worker
  • Escalação: budget exhausted → finops

Última atualização: 2026-05-31 (página criada vazia no bootstrap do MkDocs)

docs.title: Mongo Crash Loop
docs.text:
Placeholder

Esta página está aguardando conteúdo. Origem planejada: Investigação 2026-05-31 (vide learnings/troubleshooting.md)

docs.title: Sumário planejado
docs.text:
• Sintoma: container restart loop, exit 1 ~83ms
  • Logs: find: '/data/db/journal': Permission denied (red herring)
  • Causas prováveis: disco cheio, mongod.lock stale, journal corrompido
  • Diagnóstico read-only: df, ls -la mongo-data, grep fatal
  • Mitigação: depende da causa-raiz (não fazer rmtree cego)

Última atualização: 2026-05-31 (página criada vazia no bootstrap do MkDocs)
